message:
fix: use fixed reference time in tombstone merge tests (bd-eyto)

Replace time.Now() with deterministic fixed timestamps in merge tests
to prevent potential flakiness near TTL boundaries. Adds a package-level
nowFunc variable (defaulting to time.Now) that isExpiredTombstone uses,
allowing tests to inject a fixed clock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian

Role: polecats
